helpful: The provisioned petition and docket snapshot supplied the decisive merits and docket signals.
The statpack supplied paid-petition, relist, CVSG, and originating-circuit calibration.
gaps: The lower-court opinion was not provisioned and could not be located through the available CourtListener opinion searches.
The committed statpack lacked the salience-band table described in the prediction prompt.
Corpus query cannot directly filter SCOTUS petitions by originating circuit or legal issue.
notes: The corpus queries were expensive and returned recent grants rather than close legal analogues; the structured statpack was more useful for this forecast.
